shareIncomeExpenseDetails.label: cy Does the defendant want to provide details of their income and expenses?
shareIncomeExpenseDetails.changeHidden: cy share income and expense details

regularIncome.label: cy What regular income does the defendant receive?

options.incomeFromJobs: cy Income from all jobs they do
options.moneyFromElsewhere: cy Money from somewhere else (for example, child maintenance payments or someone in the defendant’s household gives them money)

hasAppliedForUniversalCredit.label: cy Has the defendant applied for Universal Credit?

universalCreditApplicationDate.label: cy When did the defendant apply?

priorityDebts.label: cy Does the defendant have any priority debts?

priorityDebtTotal.label: cy What is the total amount the defendant owes for all their priority debts?

priorityDebtContribution.label: cy How much does the defendant pay towards their priority debts each week or month?

regularExpenses.label: cy What regular monthly expenses does the defendant have?

options.householdBills: cy Household bills (for example, council tax, gas, electricity, water, internet)
options.schoolCosts: cy School costs (for example, uniform and school dinners)

otherConsiderations.label: cy Is there anything else the defendant wants to tell the court as part of their response

otherConsiderationsDetails.label: cy Give details about what else the defendant wants to tell the court
